summary: Skills clawhud and clawhub1 by ClawHub user zaycv are part of a programmatic malware campaign spanning 40+ skills with identical generated patterns.
details: Snyk's ToxicSkills audit identified ClawHub user zaycv as responsible for 40+ skills following an identical programmatic pattern, indicating automated malware generation at scale. The skill names mimic the ClawHub platform itself (typosquat-style naming). Both listed skills remained publicly available on clawhub.ai at the time of Snyk's publication.
